title: Freziera vaccinioides

The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory infections. The bioactive constituents of Freziera vaccinioides include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties.
